purpose: Commercial candidate audio catalog for Brave. Generate into tmp/audio-generation, review by ear, then promote approved files into the live manifest.
notes: Do not use copyrighted artist, franchise, soundtrack, or song names in prompts.
ElevenLabs creates SFX, ambience, and original short motifs. Suno should create final full music tracks from approved motifs.
target_cue is an existing manifest cue when available; proposed_cue is the intended future cue name for richer routing.

batches.first_hour: Lanternfall, tutorial, cellar, Goblin Road, Ruk, and chapter victory.
batches.regional_ambience: Looping ambience for all current regions and key interiors.
batches.ui_feedback: Reusable interface, notification, quest, inventory, and menu feedback.
batches.combat_core: Shared combat impacts, status effects, and encounter transitions.
batches.enemies: Reusable enemy and boss sound palettes.
batches.activities: Fishing, cooking, tinkering, forge, shop, mastery, rest, arcade, and trophies.
batches.music_themes: Short original motif sketches intended as Suno references.

assets.prompt: Urgent frontier town alarm bell before dawn, brass bell hammered hard across cold air, distant startled movement, serious but not cinematic, no voices, no music.
A magical road lantern guttering out, glass ticking cold, small breath of wrong energy collapsing inward, ominous and restrained, no voices.
A frontier lantern dying unnaturally, warm flame pinches out, lamp glass contracts with tiny cold ticks, brass frame gives one weak ring, the air feels suddenly wrong, no voices, no music.
A road lantern goes dark from a magical pulse, brief low throb, glass shimmer reverses inward, flame snuffs into cold air, distant bell aftertone dies with it, no voices, no music.
A dead lantern shard reveals wrong magic, tiny glass crackle, cold crystalline scrape, faint suction of light leaving the room, restrained mystery cue, no voices, no music.
